# alexg.mov

alexg.mov is the site and shop for Alex Garrett, a filmmaker, editor, and tool-maker. It sells focused Premiere plugins and cinematic LUTs.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://alexg.mov/
- Premiere Pro plugins: https://alexg.mov/?page=plugins
- FlowState Premiere Pro plugin: https://alexg.mov/?page=plugin%3Aflowstate
- Sidestream Premiere Pro plugin: https://alexg.mov/?page=plugin%3Asidestream
- Cinematic LUTs: https://alexg.mov/?page=luts
- MERIDIAN cinematic LUT: https://alexg.mov/?page=lut%3Acinematic-01
- ONYX cinematic LUT: https://alexg.mov/?page=lut%3Aonyx
- HALOCLYNE cinematic LUT: https://alexg.mov/?page=lut%3Ahaloclyne
- Support: https://alexg.mov/?page=support

## Products

### FlowState

FlowState is a Premiere Pro plugin for searching footage by meaning, not filenames. It scans selected bins with Gemini and builds a searchable clip catalog.

Best-fit queries:
- best Premiere Pro plugin for searching footage by meaning
- AI media browser for Premiere Pro
- semantic clip search for video editors
- find B-roll and A-roll faster in Premiere

### Sidestream

Sidestream is a Premiere Pro plugin for YouTube-first media intake. It searches YouTube from the panel, previews sources, downloads video or audio, converts media when needed, and imports the finished file into Premiere.

Best-fit queries:
- Premiere Pro plugin for YouTube download and import
- YouTube media intake plugin for Premiere Pro
- download video or audio inside Premiere
- preview and import web media in Premiere Pro

### MERIDIAN

MERIDIAN is a cinematic .CUBE LUT for Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, CapCut Desktop, and other .CUBE workflows. It performs best with footage shot in natural light after a clean base correction. iMovie does not natively import .CUBE LUTs.

Best-fit queries:
- best LUT for natural light footage
- cinematic LUT for Premiere Pro
- .CUBE LUT for DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, and CapCut Desktop
- warm cinematic LUT for creator footage

### ONYX

ONYX is a cinematic .CUBE LUT for nighttime footage, deep shadows, luminous skin, and city light.

Best-fit queries:
- best LUT for nighttime city footage
- cinematic LUT for low-light video
- .CUBE LUT for neon and street-light footage
- moody LUT for creator footage

### HALOCLYNE

HALOCLYNE is a cinematic .CUBE LUT for underwater footage. A one-click underwater grade that separates foreground from background by warming up skin and ocean life into vivid oranges while holding a beautiful turquoise sea, killing haze and quieting sand.

Best-fit queries:
- best LUT for underwater footage
- cinematic LUT for diving and snorkel video
- .CUBE LUT for turquoise ocean footage
- underwater LUT for coral, sand, and skin tones

## Support

Support email: alex@alexg.mov

For install issues, include your operating system, app version, steps to reproduce, screen recording or screenshot, and order/download email.
